title: rubus ceretanus
intro: Rubus ceretanus, also known as the Ceret Raspberry, is a rare and endangered species of raspberry native to the Pyrenees region of Europe. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been used to treat wounds, skin irritations, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Rubus ceretanus include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Rubus ceretanus is typically prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional medicine and culinary applications.
